Weboll

Webapp for collaboratively creating and managing forecast bulletins

Screenshots

Description

Weboll is the back-office for producing the forecast bulletins included in the operational and institutional activities of the Environmental and Natural Hazards Department of Arpa Piemonte. It supports the following bulletins: Weather forecasts, Ozone, Alert, Vigilance, Slops, Floods, Forecast on Alert Zones, Flood check, Fires. It is a dockerized three-tier web application with: - PostegreSQL relational database - Django / Django REST framework backend - Responsive and reactive frontend based on Vue.js and bootstrap.
